title: Hostess 7 dynamic missions — assigned output
motto: KILL first when locational or amassed — then plans, tasks, and communications.

priority_lanes.label: KILL — locational
priority_lanes.description: Active KILL with geo, census, or resolved location

priority_lanes.label: KILL — amassed
priority_lanes.description: Active KILL cluster or high-threat mass

priority_lanes.label: IDENTIFY — positional
priority_lanes.description: All objects and positionals priority 1 until familiarized

kill_priority_rules.locational: geo lat/lon, census geography, angel dossier geo, or government correlate location
kill_priority_rules.amassed: two or more active KILL targets, threat_score >= 0.85, or amassed/cluster language in counsel
kill_priority_rules.always_first: KILL lanes sort above all non-KILL missions
